results.title: Sana Saeed shares battle with eating disorder, bulimia: What it is, warning signs, dangers of delayed treatment
results.description: Bulimia nervosa is a serious eating disorder characterised by binge eating followed by compensatory behaviours, which often remains underdiagnosed.

results.title: GIMS upgrades central sterilisation hub to strengthen patient safety
results.description: The Government Institute of Medical Sciences (GIMS) has upgraded its Central Sterile Supply Department (CSSD) -- the hospital’s nodal hub for sterilising and distributing medical and surgical instruments across all clinical departments
